allow: Bash(psql postgresql://localhost:5432/hextropian_crm -c "SELECT deal_stage, COUNT\(*\) FROM customers GROUP BY deal_stage ORDER BY deal_stage;")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rep:', d['rep']['name']\); print\('accounts:', d['totals']['account_count']\); print\('byStage:', [s['deal_stage'] for s in d['byStage']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('account:', d['account']['company_name']\); print\('stageTimeline:', len\(d['stageTimeline']\)\); print\('total_days:', d['total_days']\); print\('notes:', len\(d['notes']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('account:', d['account']['company_name']\); print\('stageTimeline:', [\(s['to_stage'], s['days']\) for s in d['stageTimeline']]\); print\('total_days:', d['total_days']\)")
